items.title: Jubilant Hull City promoted to the Premier League
items.summary: Hull City have been promoted to the Premier League after a 1-0 win in the Championship playoff final against Middlesbrough on Saturday at Wembley Stadium.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Giants' Abdul Carter criticizes Jaxson Dart's inclusion at Trump rally: 'What we doing?'
items.summary: The Giants quarterback was sacked by his own teammate
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Moody: 'Looks like we're needing to consider a reset' on captaincy
items.summary: LSG director of cricket says they will review every department as they "haven't lived up to the expectation"
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
